current.summary: Continued Go extractor enhancement: integer const value extraction and struct field yaml tag extraction

activeWork.description: Implementing struct field and integer const extraction in Go extractor; discovered import-stripping issue mid-implementation
activeWork.progress: Reflect import was added but logic not yet written. KNOWN ISSUE: goimports strips unused imports between sequential edits. NEXT: Revise struct field extraction implementation to add reflect import AND usage code in single Edit call to avoid stripping.
blockers: goimports stripping reflect import between edits - must combine import + usage in one Edit

recentDecisions: Import + usage code must be added in single Edit call in Go files to prevent goimports from stripping imports
nextSteps: Revise struct field extraction implementation with reflect import and usage code combined in single Edit
Test struct field yaml tag extraction (Skill.Name with yaml:"name" → "name")
Complete skills seeder recognize.go layer (secondary request)

context.notes: Two work items: 1) Complete Go extractor with const+struct field extraction (primary, mid-implementation), 2) Build skills seeder end-to-end with recognize.go layer (secondary, design phase). Import-stripping is the blocker preventing current task completion. Multiple unclaimed handoffs available; check /handoff-resume to review.
